allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); item=d['list'][0]; print\('Name:', item['vod_name']\); print\('Play from:', item.get\('vod_play_from',''\)\); urls=item.get\('vod_play_url',''\); print\('First 500 chars of play_url:', urls[:500]\)")

Bash(node -e "const d=JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\(0,'utf8'\)\); console.log\('Total:', d.total||0\); \(d.list||[]\).slice\(0,3\).forEach\(i=>{const eps=\(i.vod_play_url||''\).split\('#'\).length; console.log\('  ['+i.vod_id+'] '+i.vod_name+' \('+\( i.vod_year||''\)+'\) eps='+eps\)}\)")
